title: Fix Logging Levels — SQLite to Information, Remove Agent.Planning* Overrides
description:
CRITICAL finding from Debugging & Observability Advocate. The Serilog SQLite sink is configured at Warning+ level. All diagnostic data is lost: goal set/completed (Information), plan action sequences (Information), dispatch correlation IDs (Debug), LLM latency/response (Information), chat message flow (Information), action OK with elapsed ms (Information), correlation state transitions (Debug).

Also: `Agent.Planning: Warning` and `Agent.Planning.Llm: Warning` overrides in appsettings.json suppress ALL planner and LLM logs from ALL sinks (console, file, SQLite, dashboard).

Fix: Change SQLite level to Information. Remove Agent.Planning* overrides or set to Information. Verify file sink retention (14 files) bounds disk usage.

Source: Sprint 51 Council, Debugging Advocate, Finding F-SQLITE-LEVEL
